scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.build: bun run --cwd shared build && bun run --cwd server build && bun run --cwd web build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd shared typecheck && bun run --cwd server typecheck && bun run --cwd web typecheck
